name: Bread Fat Substitute - Applesauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Try substituting unsweetened applesauce for the fats called for in your bread recipes, including chocolate cake.
2. Many find no difference in taste, and the pectin in applesauce keeps bread moist longer.
3. Purchase small Motts individual containers to avoid waste.
4. Up to one tablespoon of applesauce can replace each cup of flour.
5. If substituting, hold out about 1/8 to 1/4 cup of liquid from the recipe and add it back in a teaspoon at a time during kneading.
